title: Global State Capture in a Distributed System
description: A diagram showing the process of capturing a consistent global state across three processes (P1, P2, P3) and a communication channel, highlighting the concept of a consistent cut.
elements: Marker for initiating a snapshot (consistent cut)
relationships: The cut line intersects each process timeline at a specific event, defining the local state for that process
Messages sent before the cut but received after it are part of the channel state
The collection of all local states and channel states forms the consistent global state
